race.description: Xxxx Qtis Jewel Prelude 3YO Quality Handicap
race.comment: EARN TO BURN (1) has won two from two this prep, both at today's trip. Heavily backed last time and after stalking the pace into the straight quickened nicely to get the prize. Has a wide gate and 60kgs to contend with but is good enough to overcome those obstacles. ANGEL LADDER (11) led and gave a good kick but found the winner a bit strong late when resuming over this trip at Sandown a month ago. Narrowly defeated in an open class three-year-old fillies' race at Moonee Valley last prep which is good enough form for a race like this. GET READY LASS (2) drove hard late but couldn't quite match EARN TO BURN here four weeks ago. Dogged by bad gates of late. Each-way chance. FORGOTTEN SPIRIT (5) has not raced since finishing just a length off the smart Miss Freelove in a $250k race at the Gold Coast seven weeks back. Recent trial winner who has a decent record at this shorter trip. DRAGONNE ROUGE (4) disappointed as favourite here last start but is better than that.
